why.verified_text: Every listing in our portfolio is RERA-verified and personally inspected by an IRE consultant.

why.knowledge_text: Seventeen years of Bahrain transaction history. Our team lives in every neighborhood we sell.
why.support_text: From the first viewing to handover, key collection, and renewal — IRE stays with you.

about.title: About IRE Bahrain
about.subtitle: Istanbul Real Estate WLL — bringing Turkish hospitality to Bahrain real estate since 2008.
about.story_p1: Istanbul Real Estate was founded in 2008 by a small group of Bahraini and Turkish brokers who believed Bahrain's expat real estate market could be served with more discretion, more honesty, and more attention to detail than the regional norm.
about.story_p2: Seventeen years later, IRE has signed over 24,000 leases, sold over 4,000 freehold properties, and grown to become one of the kingdom's most followed real estate brands — with more than 24,000 followers on Instagram and recognition across Bahrain's expat community as the agency to call first.
about.story_p3: We hold full RERA licensing (B201806/0212 and SA201807/0101). Our office on the 15th floor of Platinum Tower, Seef, is open every day except Friday morning. We answer WhatsApp messages personally — no call centers, no chatbots, no junior offshore desks.
about.cta_text: Talk to one of our consultants — most properties are matched in a single conversation.

timeline.y2014: First RERA licensing under new regulations
